NanoUI
Getting Started

Components

Button Input Label Select Checkbox Radio Switch Card Badge Alert Dialog Dropdown Tooltip Toast Table Tabs Accordion Progress

Badge

Small status indicators. Uses BEM classes on <span> elements.

Variants

Preview
Primary Secondary Destructive Success Warning Outline 
<span class="nano-badge nano-badge--primary">Primary</span>
<span class="nano-badge nano-badge--secondary">Secondary</span>
<span class="nano-badge nano-badge--destructive">Destructive</span>
<span class="nano-badge nano-badge--success">Success</span>
<span class="nano-badge nano-badge--warning">Warning</span>
<span class="nano-badge nano-badge--outline">Outline</span>
